# gnr8

> gnr8 is a code-first API extraction tool for agents and developers. It generates OpenAPI 3.1 and
> typed Go/Python/TypeScript SDKs from Go Gin, FastAPI, Flask typed-envelope, and NestJS class DTO
> source code. Configuration lives in `.gnr8/src/main.rs`.

Start here when using gnr8 from an AI coding agent:

- [Task-Routed Agent Docs](docs/agents/index.md): choose one focused page instead of loading the full
  documentation set.
- [CLI Commands](docs/cli/commands.md): syntax, flags, JSON, and exit behavior.
- [Pipeline Configuration](docs/pipeline/configuration.md): `.gnr8/src/main.rs` and custom stages.
- [Transforms](docs/pipeline/transforms.md): selectors, overrides, security, runtime, pagination, docs.
- [Sources](docs/extraction/sources.md): Go/Gin, FastAPI, Flask, NestJS, and OpenAPI extraction.
- [OpenAPI](docs/openapi/generation.md): generation, metadata, aliases, and patches.
- [SDK Generation](docs/sdk/generation.md): Go, Python, and TypeScript targets/profiles/layouts.
- [Diagnostics](docs/diagnostics/reference.md): stable codes, categories, gates, and remediation.
- [Artifacts and CI](docs/operations/artifacts-and-ci.md): ownership, caches, Action, and write safety.
- [Public API Map](docs/reference/public-api.md): all SDK prelude symbols.
- [Agent Usage Guide](docs/AGENT-USAGE.md): single-page onboarding and recovery summary.
- [Go/Gin to Python and TypeScript SDKs](docs/guides/go-gin-to-python-typescript.md): complex Go
  backend to OpenAPI plus two SDK targets.
- [Python APIs to Python SDK](docs/guides/python-apis-to-python-sdk.md): FastAPI or Flask typed
  backend to OpenAPI plus a Python SDK.
- [NestJS to TypeScript SDK](docs/guides/nestjs-to-typescript-sdk.md): NestJS class DTO backend to
  OpenAPI plus a TypeScript SDK.
- [Full Usage Reference](docs/USAGE.md): dense command, pipeline, source-envelope, type-mapping, and
  diagnostics reference.
- [README](README.md): product overview and quick example.
- [Release and Install](docs/RELEASE.md): GitHub release archive layout and install script.
- [Bookstore Go Example](examples/bookstore/README.md): Go/Gin source to OpenAPI and Go SDK.
- [FastAPI Example](examples/fastapi-bookstore/README.md): FastAPI source to OpenAPI and Python SDK.
- [Flask Example](examples/flask-bookstore/README.md): Flask typed-envelope source to OpenAPI and
  Python SDK.
- [NestJS Example](examples/nestjs-bookstore/README.md): NestJS source to OpenAPI and TypeScript SDK.
- [Taskflow Example](examples/taskflow/README.md): custom Rust transform and custom target.

Runtime guide entry points:

```bash
gnr8 guide
gnr8 guide go-gin-to-python-typescript
gnr8 guide python-apis-to-python-sdk
gnr8 guide nestjs-to-typescript-sdk
```

Full context file:

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): compact combined documentation for larger context windows.

Prefer the task-routed Markdown pages above; load `llms-full.txt` only when broad context is required.
